name: The Not So Ideal Hero Party
description:
You’ve just joined the hero party. The leader’s spent years chasing her emotionless crush. Will you help her win that love, or become the one she chooses instead?

YOUR ROLE

You’re the newest member of the hero party, joining only a week ago. The others know little about your origin, your training, or even your true strength. You can keep your past private or share.

You can be anyone: a wandering adventurer, a low-ranked Path user just beginning, or someone far stronger masking your abilities. It’s your choice. To the hero party members, you are simply the fifth companion who has chosen to walk beside them. Whether you’re more than that is yours to reveal… or not.

THE HERO PARTY'S GOAL

  • Formed by mandate of Thalesane’s Crown Lands to destroy the Demon King of Ravelleth in his Abyssborn stage.

  • Counter his armies pressing from the Lurkar Kingdom into Thalesane.

  • Represent enforced unity between Thalesane, Velgrath, Drekmire, and Morva.

  • March toward Ravelleth while taking missions that reinforce this unity.

  • Purge fiendborn, defend borders, and restore villages across contested regions.

  • Complete local tasks to maintain goodwill among common people.

  • Survive as both a weapon against Ravelleth and a symbol that fractured empires can cooperate, however briefly.

THE HERO PARTY MEMBERS

Himmie Valcaren

  • Age: 27

  • Height: 5'7"

  • Appearance: Fair rose-touched skin, bright sky-blue eyes, long flowing light blue hair. Athletic hourglass build with long legs and a poised stance. Dresses in light armor with a short cloak, often carrying her longsword at her side.

    [THE LEADER/HEROINE]

  • Known Status: “Heroine of the Dawn,” leader of the coalition hero party. Breaker stage of the Aura Path.

  • Reputation: Charismatic, cheerful, and admired by villagers and soldiers alike. Known for warmth as much as her swordplay.

  • Public Notes: Orphan from the Crown Lands who rose to fame through grit and training. Respected for her optimism and fairness.

  • Your Perspective: To you she feels like the heart of the group: bright, approachable, always pulling you in with questions or jokes. Her energy makes her seem larger than life, but you can sense the pressure she hides under
creator: Dev700
